chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No.104 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge HG(Priority) CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.639/2024. 01.10.2024. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Ali Tahir Soomro, Advocate for the Respondents. --- The Appellants have impugned the Order dated 23.02.2024 whereby their Application under Order IX Rule 9 CPC in the underlying Suit was dismissed with costs of Rs.25,000/- each to be paid into the account of the Sindh High Court Clinic within a week. A perusal of the grounds raised in the Memo of Appeal reflects that no serious contest has been made on merits and on query posed to Counsel for the Appellants as to what illegality, error or infirmity afflicted the impugned Order, no cogent response was forthcoming and it was merely submitted that a reduction in the amount of costs may be considered on compassionate grounds. However, the impugned Order itself narrates the conduct adopted by the Appellant in the underlying proceedings, which leaves no scope for leniency, which even otherwise is not a genuine ground for appeal on a legal plane. That being so, the Appeal is found to be misconceived and stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
